title: Repeated click on the same nav button does not break the view (Notas)
description: Verifies clicking the currently active nav button again keeps the same view visible and stable.

steps.description: Click "Notas" nav button to view grades/performance
Click "Notas" nav button to view grades/performance

title: View Cursos list and course card details
description: Verifies the Cursos view loads and shows course cards with expected summary fields.

steps.description: Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses
Verify element "a course card" is visible
Verify element "course card progress indicator" is visible

title: Open Add Course modal from Cursos view
description: Verifies the Add Course modal opens and shows required fields and actions.

steps.description: Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses
Click "+" button to open Add Course modal
Verify element "course name input" is visible

title: Create a new course successfully and see it in the list
description: Verifies a course can be created from the modal and appears in the Cursos list with default values.

steps.description: Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses
Click "+" button to open Add Course modal
Fill "Algebra I - E2E" into course name input
Fill "Lun y Mié 08:00" into schedule input
Click "Añadir" button to create new course
Verify text "Algebra I - E2E" is visible

title: Newly created course shows schedule and default progress
description: Verifies the new course card displays the entered schedule and default progress value (0%).

steps.description: Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses
Click "+" button to open Add Course modal
Fill "Historia - Progreso 0" into course name input
Click "Añadir" button to create new course

title: Cancel Add Course modal without saving
description: Verifies Cancel closes the modal and no new course is added.

steps.description: Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses
Click "+" button to open Add Course modal
Fill "Curso No Guardado" into course name input
Click "Cancelar" to close modal without saving
Verify element "Añadir curso modal" is not visible
Verify text "Curso No Guardado" is not visible

title: Validation: missing course name shows error and prevents creation
description: Verifies leaving the course name blank triggers an error toast and does not add a course.

steps.description: Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses
Click "+" button to open Add Course modal
Verify element "Añadir curso modal" is visible

title: Validation recovery: add course after initial missing-name error
description: Verifies user can correct the missing name after an error and successfully create the course.

steps.description: Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses
Click "+" button to open Add Course modal
Fill "Curso Recuperado" into course name input
Click "Añadir" button to create new course

title: Toast appears after course creation and modal closes
description: Verifies a success toast is shown and the Add Course modal is dismissed after creating a course.

steps.description: Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses
Click "+" button to open Add Course modal
Fill "Curso Toast" into course name input
Click "Añadir" button to create new course
Verify element "Añadir curso modal" is not visible

title: Mark a student as presente and finalize the attendance register for a selected course
description: Verifies a teacher can switch to Asistencia, select a course, mark a student as presente, and finalize the register with visible confirmation.

steps.description: Click a course filter to switch to a different course than the default
Verify element "list of students with attendance status" is visible
Click green check button next to a student to mark student as "presente"
Click "Finalizar Registro" button to confirm attendance

title: Mark a student as ausente, then change to presente, and finalize
description: Verifies attendance status can be changed before finalizing and the UI reflects the latest choice.

steps.description: Click a course filter to switch to the target course
Verify element "list of students with attendance status" is visible
Click red X button next to a student to mark student as "ausente"
Click green check button next to the same student to mark student as "presente"
Click "Finalizar Registro" button to confirm attendance

title: Switch courses and verify the student list updates for the selected course
description: Verifies the course filter changes the visible attendance list context so the teacher is tracking the intended course.

steps.description: Click a course filter to switch to course A
Verify element "list of students with attendance status" is visible
Click a different course filter to switch to course B
Verify element "list of students with attendance status" is visible

title: Finalize register with no attendance changes made
description: Verifies the teacher can finalize the register even if no student attendance buttons were clicked, and the UI responds gracefully.

steps.description: Click a course filter to switch to the target course
Verify element "list of students with attendance status" is visible
Click "Finalizar Registro" button to confirm attendance

title: Create a new task from '+ Nueva' and verify it appears in Pending with due date
description: Verifies a user can create a task with a title and due date and see it listed in the pending tasks with the due date displayed.

steps.description: Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal
Fill task title input with "Tarea E2E - Matemáticas"
Verify text "Tarea E2E - Matemáticas" is visible

title: Validate required title: blank title shows error and task is not created
description: Verifies creating a task without a title shows a visible error/validation message and does not add a new task to the list.

steps.description: Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal
Verify element "Add Task" modal is visible
Verify text "Tarea E2E -" is not visible

title: Complete a pending task using 'Marcar Finalizada' and verify it moves to Completed
description: Verifies a user can mark a pending task as completed and then see it in the completed tasks list.

steps.description: Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal
Fill task title input with "Tarea para completar"
Click "Marcar Finalizada" for task "Tarea para completar"

title: Reopen a completed task using 'Reabrir' and verify it returns to Pending
description: Verifies a user can reopen a completed task and see it return to the pending task list.

steps.description: Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal
Fill task title input with "Tarea para reabrir"
Click "Marcar Finalizada" for task "Tarea para reabrir"

title: Open Add Task modal using dashed 'Nueva Tarea' button at bottom
description: Verifies the alternate dashed 'Nueva Tarea' button opens the Add Task modal and allows task creation.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the tasks view
Click dashed "Nueva Tarea" button at bottom
Verify element "Add Task" modal is visible
Fill task title input with "Tarea creada desde botón inferior"
Verify text "Tarea creada desde botón inferior" is visible

title: Create multiple tasks and verify both appear in Pending list
description: Verifies the tasks list can display more than one pending task created in the same session.

steps.description: Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal
Fill task title input with "Tarea A"
Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal
Fill task title input with "Tarea B"

title: Cancel/close Add Task modal without creating a task
description: Verifies the user can dismiss the Add Task modal and no new task is added when the modal is closed without creating.

steps.description: Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal
Fill task title input with "Tarea que no debe crearse"
Verify element "Add Task" modal is not visible
Verify text "Tarea que no debe crearse" is not visible

title: Create a task with title containing accents and punctuation
description: Verifies task titles with Spanish characters and punctuation render correctly in the pending list.

steps.description: Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal
Fill task title input with "Lectura: 'El niño' – capítulo 3"
Verify text "Lectura: 'El niño' – capítulo 3" is visible

title: Open Notas view and verify performance summary widgets are visible
description: Verifies the Grades/Performance view loads and shows key summary metrics for students and tasks.

title: Verify total students count is displayed in Notas view
description: Ensures the Notas view displays a visible total students count value.

steps.description: Verify element "Total students count value" is visible
Verify element "Total students count value" is visible

title: Verify completed/total tasks ratio is displayed in Notas view
description: Ensures the Notas view shows a completed/total tasks ratio as a visible value.

steps.description: Verify element "Completed tasks ratio value" is visible
Verify element "Total tasks value" is visible

title: Verify average grade per course shows 8.5 for each listed course
description: Validates that each course average in the Notas view displays the hardcoded value 8.5.

steps.description: Verify element "Course average grade list" is visible

title: Notas view content is accessible after switching away and back using bottom navigation
description: Verifies the Notas view can be re-entered via navigation and still shows the performance metrics.

title: Notas view renders without course data-dependent errors (baseline visibility checks)
description: Checks that the Notas view shows the averages section and does not appear empty or broken.

steps.description: Verify element "Course average grade list" is visible

title: Enable dark mode from header toggle
description: Verifies the user can switch from light mode to dark mode using the moon/sun icon in the header.

steps.description: Verify element "moon/sun icon button in the header" is visible
Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Verify element "sun icon in the header (indicating dark mode is enabled)" is visible

title: Disable dark mode and return to light mode
description: Verifies the user can switch back from dark mode to light mode using the same header toggle.

steps.description: Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Verify element "sun icon in the header (indicating dark mode is enabled)" is visible
Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Verify element "moon icon in the header (indicating light mode is enabled)" is visible

title: Dark mode preference persists after reload
description: Verifies dark mode remains enabled after reloading the app when localStorage is intact.

steps.description: Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Verify element "sun icon in the header (indicating dark mode is enabled)" is visible
Verify element "sun icon in the header (indicating dark mode is enabled)" is visible

title: Light mode preference persists after reload
description: Verifies light mode remains enabled after reloading the app when localStorage is intact.

steps.description: Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Verify element "moon icon in the header (indicating light mode is enabled)" is visible
Verify element "moon icon in the header (indicating light mode is enabled)" is visible

title: Dark mode toggle works from any main view
description: Verifies the theme toggle is accessible and works after navigating within the single-page app.

steps.description: Click on "Asistencia" in the bottom navigation
Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Verify element "sun icon in the header (indicating dark mode is enabled)" is visible
Click on "Notas" in the bottom navigation

title: Rapid repeated toggling ends in correct final state (dark)
description: Verifies multiple quick toggles do not break the UI and the final theme state matches the last click.

steps.description: Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Click on "moon/sun icon button in the header"
Verify element "sun icon in the header (indicating dark mode is enabled)" is visible

title: Settings menu exposes both backup and restore actions
description: Verifies that the settings menu provides visible actions for both backing up and restoring data.

steps.description: Click settings gear icon in header
Verify text "Copia de Seguridad" is visible
